purpose: Provide a token-light entrypoint for machine readers before loading the full system information map.

read_policy.default_entrypoint: Read this manifest before loading system/information-map.json when the task only needs map refs.
read_policy.full_map_read_rule: Load system/information-map.json only when the manifest and relevant shard are insufficient.
read_policy.token_policy: Prefer shard refs and reference surfaces over full-map scans.

shard_index.read_policy: Use for module boundary, dataflow, entrypoint and root information-map refs.
Use before changing information-map related governance surfaces.
